name: JellySkin
author: prayag17
description: A vibrant Jellyfin theme with glassmorphism, gradient accents, and smooth animations.

vars.name: Accent 1 Light
vars.description: Primary accent color (lighter shade) - purple by default.

vars.name: Accent 2 Light
vars.description: Secondary accent color (lighter shade) - blue by default.

vars.name: Remove Backdrop Blur
vars.description: Disables blur effects for better performance on low-end devices.

vars.name: Remove Scroll Fade
vars.description: Removes the gradient fade effect on scrollable containers.

vars.name: Horizontal My Media
vars.description: Restores the horizontal scrolling layout for the My Media section.

vars.name: Video Player Theme Blur
vars.description: Applies blur effect to video player backgrounds. May impact performance.

addons.name: Remove Backdrop Blur
addons.description: Disables all backdrop-filter blur effects for improved performance.

addons.name: Remove Scroll Fade
addons.description: Removes mask-image fade effects on scrollable containers.

addons.name: Horizontal My Media
addons.description: Restores horizontal scrolling for the My Media section on the home page.

addons.name: Video Player Blur
addons.description: Applies backdrop blur to the video player background.
